Variables.Name: Location
Variables.Description: Location in Landscape-space

Variables.Name: Rotation
Variables.Description: Rotation of tangent vector at this point (in landscape-space)

Variables.Name: Width
Variables.Description: Width of the spline at this point.

Variables.Name: SideFalloff
Variables.Description: Falloff at the sides of the spline at this point.

Variables.Name: EndFalloff
Variables.Description: Falloff at the startend of the spline (if this point is a start or end point, otherwise ignored).

Variables.Name: Points
Variables.Description: Spline points

Variables.Name: Bounds
Variables.Description: Bounds of points

Variables.Name: LocalMeshComponent
Variables.Description: Control point mesh

Variables.Name: SegmentMeshOffset
Variables.Description: Vertical offset of the spline segment mesh. Useful for a river's surface, among other things.

Variables.Name: LayerName
Variables.Description:
Name of blend layer to paint when applying spline to landscape
	  If "none", no layer is painted

Variables.Name: bRaiseTerrain
Variables.Description: If the spline is above the terrain, whether to raise the terrain up to the level of the spline when applying it to the landscape.

Variables.Name: bLowerTerrain
Variables.Description: If the spline is below the terrain, whether to lower the terrain down to the level of the spline when applying it to the landscape.

Variables.Name: Mesh
Variables.Description: Mesh to use on the control point

Variables.Name: MaterialOverrides
Variables.Description: Overrides mesh's materials

Variables.Name: MeshScale
Variables.Description: Scale of the control point mesh

Variables.Name: bEnableCollision
Variables.Description: Whether to enable collision for the Control Point Mesh.

Variables.Name: bCastShadow
Variables.Description: Whether the Control Point Mesh should cast a shadow.

Variables.Name: LDMaxDrawDistance
Variables.Description: Max draw distance for the mesh used on this control point

Variables.Name: TranslucencySortPriority
Variables.Description:
Translucent objects with a lower sort priority draw behind objects with a higher priority.
	  Translucent objects with the same priority are rendered from back-to-front based on their bounds origin.
	 
	  Ignored if the object is not translucent.  The default priority is zero.
	  Warning: This should never be set to a non-default value unless you know what you are doing, as it will prevent the renderer from sorting correctly.

Variables.Name: bPlaceSplineMeshesInStreamingLevels
Variables.Description: Whether control point mesh should be placed in landscape proxy streaming level (true) or the spline's level (false)

Variables.Name: bRenderToTerrainVirtualTexture
Variables.Description: This spline will be rendered to terrain VT if true

Variables.Name: TerrainRVTRenderSortPriority
Variables.Description:
Objects with a lower sort priority draw behind objects with a higher priority.
	  Objects with the same priority are rendered from back-to-front based on their bounds origin.

Variables.Name: ForeignWorld
Variables.Description: World reference for if mesh component is stored in another streaming level

Variables.Name: ModificationKey
Variables.Description: Key for tracking whether this segment has been modified relative to the mesh component stored in another streaming level
